overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a wizarding school uniform exploring a historic castle courtyard and gardens at night. The character walks along stone pathways past vintage lamps, a glowing gazebo with stained glass, and approaches a tiered fountain under stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle exterior walkway with vintage lamps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone castle wall past warm glowing lanterns

entered.detail: tall historic stone castle wall with illuminated gothic windows
ornate black metal street lamp with warm yellow glow
wooden slat bench with stone supports along the pathway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path beside a massive stone castle wall. Vintage street lamps provide warm pools of light against the cool night, with illuminated windows visible high on the castle facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornamental gazebo with illuminated stained glass dome

events.description: exiting the narrow castle walkway into open courtyard with gazebo structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the gazebo with brightly glowing green stained glass dome

entered.detail: circular stone gazebo with classical columns and open sides
illuminated green stained glass dome emitting bright emerald glow
tall cylindrical stone tower with multiple lit windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider courtyard where an ornate gazebo with a brilliantly glowing green stained glass dome stands as the focal point. The character walks around the structure, with a tall castle tower visible against the stormy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: manicured garden path with trimmed hedges

events.description: exiting the gazebo area into garden pathways with hedgerows

agents.ego_description: walking through garden pathways lined with tall trimmed hedges and flower beds

entered.detail: tall neatly trimmed hedge rows lining both sides of the path
gothic stone archway entrance leading to outer gardens
raised stone flower beds with white flowering plants

segments.scene_description: Leaving the gazebo behind, the character enters a garden path flanked by tall hedges and flower beds. The path leads toward a stone archway, with the castle tower now visible to the left against dark storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden plaza with statuary and topiary

events.description: large stag statue on pedestal becomes visible in the garden ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the large stag statue on a stone pedestal

entered.detail: large bronze stag statue with antlers standing on tall stone pedestal
multi-tiered circular stone fountain in the garden center

segments.scene_description: The garden opens into a wide plaza where a majestic stag statue stands on a pedestal. In the distance, a tiered fountain marks the center of the garden, while vintage lamps dot the landscape under the stormy night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the central tiered stone fountain

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stag statue, the character approaches the tiered fountain at the garden's center. The fountain grows larger in view as the character walks along the paved path, with the stormy sky visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow castle corridor into an expansive, stormy garden plaza. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path beside a massive stone wall, where warm pools of light from vintage lamps contrast with the cool night. As the path opens into a wider courtyard, the camera circles an ornate gazebo with a glowing green stained glass dome set against a towering castle spire and a turbulent sky. The scene then shifts through a garden path flanked by tall hedges and a stone archway before expanding into a wide plaza featuring a majestic stag statue on a pedestal. Finally, the camera moves past the statue and follows the paved path toward a tiered fountain that grows larger in view under the dark, stormy clouds.
